21.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
21.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

21.gl: properly, to dawn, i.e. (figuratively) be (up) early at any task (with the implication of earnestness); by extension, to search for (with painstaking)
21.kj: (do something) betimes, enquire early, rise (seek) betimes, seek diligently) early, in the morning).

21.gl: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
21.kj: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.
